config._beta_note: Ramps 0.5→1.0 linearly over first 50k steps, flat at 1.0 for final 50k. Posterior estimates use β=1 tail only (steps 50000-99999); chain trajectory up to step 49999 is tempered burn-in.
config._ckpt_note: 10 every-10k checkpoints: steps 9999, 19999, ..., 99999. Post-hoc: use steps 49999+ for β=1-only posterior.
